pages.name: Home
pages.description: Main entry page highlighting key services (extensions, kitchen and bathroom renovations, loft conversions) and tools like the cost calculator and multi-project plan builder. Provides shortcuts into listings, projects, blog, FAQs, and contact.
primary_functions: Introduce the builder’s core services (extensions, renovations, conversions) with clear CTAs.
Provide direct access to key tasks such as viewing extensions, kitchen renovations, and projects.
Provide a prominent link to the cost calculator for quick renovation estimates.
Provide a prominent link to the multi-project renovation plan builder.
Surface shortcuts to recent blog posts, FAQs, and contact options.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Extensions' in the main navigation or homepage CTAs.
Click on 'Kitchen Renovations' card or header link.
Click on 'Bathroom Renovations' card or header link.
Click on 'Projects' in header or homepage projects teaser.
Click on 'Cost Calculator' in header or hero 'Get an estimate' button.
Click on 'Plan Your Renovation' in header or 'Build your renovation plan' CTA.
Click on any blog teaser or 'View all articles'.
Click on 'Help / FAQ' in header or FAQ highlights.
Click on 'Reading List' in header.
Click on 'Shortlist' in header.
Click on 'Ideas' in header or 'Saved ideas' shortcut.
Click on 'Contact' in header or contact teaser in footer of homepage.
Click on 'Learn more about us' or similar about CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Home' in main navigation.
Default landing page at the root URL.

pages.name: Package Listings
pages.description: Category-based listing of extension, kitchen renovation, and bathroom renovation packages. Supports rich filtering (type, size, price) and sorting, plus compare and shortlist actions.
primary_functions: Display package lists for different categories such as extensions, kitchen renovations, and bathroom renovations based on categoryId.
Filter packages by attributes like extension type (e.g., rear extension), size range (sqm), price/budget, and other relevant options.
Sort package results by criteria such as price (low to high), popularity, or size.
Allow users to open package detail pages for more information on any package.
Allow users to mark packages for comparison using an 'Add to compare' control.
Allow users to add packages directly to their shortlist/favorites from the listing view.

incoming_params.description: Determines which package category to show. One of 'extensions', 'kitchen_renovations', 'bathroom_renovations'. Required for initial load.
Optional filter for extensions. One of extension_type enums such as 'rear_extension'. Used mainly when categoryId='extensions'.
Optional minimum size filter for packages (e.g., 20 for 20–30 sqm rear extensions).
Optional maximum size filter for packages (e.g., 30 for 20–30 sqm rear extensions).
Optional minimum price filter.
Optional maximum price/budget filter (e.g., 80000 or 120000).
Optional sort key for listing, such as 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'size_desc'.
Pagination index for the listing results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a package card or title in the listing.
Click on the 'Compare (n)' bar/button after adding packages to compare.
Click on 'View shortlist' link or icon from the listing toolbar.
Click 'Back to home' breadcrumb or logo in header.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Extensions', 'Kitchen Renovations', or 'Bathroom Renovations' header links with appropriate categoryId.
Filters, sort, and pagination are managed via query parameters so URLs can be shared or revisited.

pages.name: Package Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific renovation or extension package. Shows size, price, inclusions, media gallery, and key calls to action for quote requests, consultations, and shortlist.
primary_functions: Present full details of the selected package, including floor area, price, inclusions, and photos.
Allow users to submit a quote request for this specific package via an on-page 'Get a quote' form.
Allow users to book a consultation for this specific package via an on-page 'Book consultation' form.
Allow users to save the package to their shortlist or favorites for later review.
Provide links back to the relevant package listing and to related or alternative packages.

incoming_params.description: The Package.id to display details for. Required.
Optional category context (e.g., 'extensions') used to build 'Back to listing' links.
Optional navigation context: 'listing', 'shortlist', 'compare', or 'home'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to [category] packages' breadcrumb.
Click on 'View shortlist' after saving a package.

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking a package card and passing ?id={packageId}.
Featured packages on the homepage can deep-link directly here.

pages.name: Compare Packages
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison view for two or more selected packages from the listings or shortlist, focusing on price, added floor area, and features.
primary_functions: Display a comparison table for selected packages, including price, added floor area (sqm), and key features.
Help users identify which package offers the larger floor area or better value within a given budget.
Allow users to click through to the detail page of any compared package.
Allow users to modify the compared set by removing packages or returning to the listings to add different ones.

incoming_params.description: Optional identifier for the current comparison set. If omitted, the active compare set from local storage is used.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a package title or 'View details' link in the comparison table.
Click on 'Back to extensions' or 'Add more packages' from the compare view.

access_methods.description: Reached via a 'Compare (n)' button from the package listings.
Optional compare_set_id parameter allows sharing the comparison URL.

pages.name: Shortlist
pages.description: Central page for viewing and managing all saved packages (favorites/shortlist) across extensions, kitchens, and bathrooms.
primary_functions: Display all packages the user has saved to their shortlist.
Allow users to remove packages from their shortlist.
Allow users to open the detail page for any shortlisted package.
Provide shortcuts to actions such as requesting quotes or booking consultations for shortlisted packages.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on any shortlisted package card.
Click on 'Browse more extensions' from shortlist page.
Click on 'Browse kitchen renovations' from shortlist page.
Click on 'Browse bathroom renovations' from shortlist page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Shortlist' in the main navigation.
Linked from package detail pages and possibly from the homepage.

pages.name: Projects Gallery
pages.description: Filterable gallery of completed renovation and extension projects, including loft conversions, extensions, kitchens, and bathrooms, with ratings and completion years.
primary_functions: Display a gallery of completed projects with thumbnails, ratings, year of completion, and project type labels.
Filter projects by type (e.g., loft conversion), completion year range, rating (e.g., 4.5+ stars), and possibly location.
Allow users to apply filters and update the visible project list.
Allow users to open individual project detail pages from any project thumbnail.

incoming_params.description: Optional project type filter such as 'loft_conversion', 'rear_extension'.
Optional filter for minimum completion year (e.g., 2023).
Optional filter for maximum completion year.
Optional filter for minimum star rating (e.g., 4.5).
Optional location filter.
Optional sort key for projects, such as 'rating_desc' or 'year_desc'.
Pagination index for the gallery.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a project thumbnail or title.
Click on 'View Ideas list' in gallery toolbar.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Projects' in the main navigation.
Filter and sort state is reflected in query parameters.

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Detailed case study page for a specific completed project with imagery, description, stats (type, floor area, rating, completion year), and ability to save to Ideas.
primary_functions: Show project photos, description, key stats (type, floor area, completion year, rating), and client notes.
Allow users to save the project to their Ideas list via a 'Save to Ideas' or favorite control.
Provide navigation back to the filtered projects gallery view.
Encourage further engagement with links to related projects or relevant service packages.

incoming_params.description: The Project.id to display. Required.
Optional context such as 'projects', 'ideas', or 'home' for back-navigation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to gallery' or breadcrumb.
Click on 'View Ideas list' from the project detail page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via project links with ?id={projectId}.

pages.name: Ideas List
pages.description: Collection of user-saved project ideas (from the gallery and project detail pages), used for inspiration and as starting points for planning.
primary_functions: Display all projects saved to the user’s Ideas list.
Allow users to open the detail page of any saved project.
Allow users to remove projects from the Ideas list.
Provide links from ideas to relevant packages or quote/plan-builder flows to turn ideas into projects.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved project tile or title.
Click on 'Browse more projects' from Ideas list.
Click on 'Turn these ideas into a renovation plan' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Ideas' in the main navigation.
Linked from project detail pages after saving ideas.

pages.name: Cost Calculator
pages.description: Interactive renovation cost calculator for extensions and renovations, with options like project type, bedrooms/bathrooms, finish level, and budget. Displays an estimated cost and allows emailing the summary.
primary_functions: Collect basic project details such as project type (e.g., full home renovation), bedroom and bathroom count, finish level, and user budget.
Generate a cost estimate and breakdown based on the entered project parameters.
Display the estimate results on the page in a clear, itemized format.
Provide a 'Send summary' or 'Email this estimate' form so users can email the estimate to themselves.
Encourage follow-up actions such as requesting a formal quote or starting a multi-project plan from the estimate.

incoming_params.description: Optional initial project type for the calculator, e.g., 'full_home_renovation'.
Optional prefilled number of bedrooms.
Optional prefilled number of bathrooms.
Optional preselected finish level, such as 'mid_range'.
Optional budget value to prefill the budget field.
Optional flag (e.g., '1') indicating that an estimate should be displayed on load using stored calculator inputs.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Plan this renovation' or similar CTA from the estimate results.
Click on 'Ask about planning permits' link from the calculator page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Cost Calculator' in the main navigation.
Linked from homepage hero ('Get an estimate').
Supports prefilled parameters for shared calculator links.

pages.name: Blog
pages.description: Searchable, filterable listing of renovation blog articles, including topics such as planning permits for extensions, design tips, and budgeting advice.
primary_functions: List blog articles with titles, excerpts, publication dates, and categories.
Provide a search bar for keyword queries (e.g., 'planning permit extension').
Allow filtering by publication year (e.g., 2023 and later) and possibly by topic.
Allow users to open full article pages by clicking article titles.
Provide pagination or lazy loading for navigating through older posts.

incoming_params.description: Search query string, such as 'planning permit extension'.
Minimum publication year filter (e.g., 2023).
Maximum publication year filter.
Optional category filter for articles.
Optional tag filter for articles.
Pagination index for the blog listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title or 'Read more' link.
Click on 'Reading List' link or icon.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Blog' in the main navigation.
Search and filter state are encoded in query parameters.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content page for a single blog article, including planning permit advice, images, and related article suggestions. Supports saving to Reading List and returning to blog.
primary_functions: Display the full article content, including headings, images, and publication metadata.
Allow users to add the article to their Reading List or Saved Articles collection.
Provide navigation back to the blog listing or previously filtered/search results.
Encourage further reading via links to related articles on similar topics (e.g., planning permits, extensions).

incoming_params.description: The Article.id to display. Required.
Optional context such as 'blog' or 'reading_list' for back-navigation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to blog' link.
Click on 'View Reading List' from the article page.

access_methods.description: Opened when a blog result or saved article link passes ?id={articleId}.

pages.name: Reading List
pages.description: List of articles that the user has saved for later reading, including topics such as planning permits for extensions and renovation tips.
primary_functions: Display all articles saved to the user’s reading list, showing titles and key metadata.
Allow users to open any saved article in the article detail view.
Allow users to remove articles from their reading list.
Provide navigation back to the main blog for discovering more articles.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the title of a saved article.
Click on 'Back to blog' or 'Find more articles' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Reading List' in the main navigation.

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Central help page with searchable FAQs covering processes, pricing, warranty (including bathroom renovation warranty), and general renovation questions. Provides deep links to contact form for follow-up.
primary_functions: Display a categorized list of frequently asked questions covering services, process, warranties, and costs.
Provide a search box for users to search FAQs by keyword (e.g., 'bathroom warranty').
Allow users to expand or open specific FAQ answers, including one about bathroom renovation warranty.
Provide contextual links from relevant FAQ answers (such as warranty details) to the contact form for follow-up questions.

incoming_params.description: Search term used to filter FAQs, such as 'bathroom warranty'.
Optional FAQ category to filter by, such as 'warranty' or 'bathroom_renovations'.
Optional specific FaqItem.id to auto-expand when the page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Contact us about this' from the bathroom renovation warranty FAQ entry.
Click on a general 'Still have questions? Contact us' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Help / FAQ' in the main navigation.
Search and category filters are encoded in query parameters.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact and inquiry form for questions and follow-ups related to any service, including deep-linked follow-ups from FAQs (e.g., bathroom renovation warranty).
primary_functions: Provide a contact form that collects subject/topic, message, name, email, and optional phone number.
Support deep-linked subjects (such as bathroom renovation questions) from FAQ pages.
Allow users to submit follow-up questions about specific topics like bathroom renovation warranties.
Display basic contact details (phone, email, address) and possibly a simple map or service area note.

incoming_params.description: Preselected subject/topic for the contact form: one of 'bathroom_renovation', 'kitchen_renovation', 'extension', 'planning_permits', 'general'.
Indicates where the contact form was opened from: 'contact_page', 'faq_page', or 'other'.
Optional FaqItem.id used to link a contact submission back to a specific FAQ, such as the bathroom renovation warranty FAQ.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to FAQ' when source_page=faq_page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' in the main navigation.
Subject and FAQ linkage can be preset via URL parameters from FAQ or other pages.
Users submit the contact form on this page to send inquiries.

pages.name: Renovation Plan Builder
pages.description: Multi-step form for defining a combined, multi-project renovation plan. Users can add multiple project line items (e.g., bathroom renovation and deck extension) with budgets and then submit a combined quote request.
primary_functions: Allow users to define multiple projects (e.g., bathroom renovation, deck extension) within one overall plan.
Collect per-project details such as project type, budget, and property type (e.g., apartment or house).
Guide users through a step to add personal details like name, email, phone, and postcode.
Allow users to submit the complete multi-project renovation plan as a combined quote request.
Summarize the multi-project plan for review before final submission.

incoming_params.description: Optional step to open on load, such as 'projects', 'details', or 'review'.
Optional context indicating where the user started the plan builder, such as 'home', 'ideas', or 'calculator'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Have questions? Contact us' link from the plan builder.
Click on 'Back to home' after submitting the renovation plan or via breadcrumb.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Plan Your Renovation' in the main navigation.
Linked from homepage CTAs and Ideas list ('Turn ideas into a plan').
Optional start_step and from parameters preserve multi-step flow state.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the builder, including company history, expertise, qualifications, and service areas across renovations and extensions. Provides CTAs to view projects, request quotes, or contact the team.
primary_functions: Explain the company’s history, expertise, and specialties in renovations and extensions.
Highlight qualifications, licenses, warranties, and quality assurances.
Describe service areas, typical project sizes, and types of clients served.
Provide links to key actions, such as requesting a quote, viewing projects, or contacting the team.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View our projects' from the About page.
Click on 'Explore extension packages' CTA.
Click on 'Contact our team' from About page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' link in the footer.
May be linked from homepage or other content explaining company background.

pages.name: Legal
pages.description: Legal information including terms of use, privacy policy, and other compliance notes regarding the website, data collection, and warranties. Users can view sections via URL parameters and contact the team for legal or privacy questions.
primary_functions: Explain the website’s terms of use and any limitations of information provided.
Describe the privacy policy, including how user data from forms and tools is handled.
Outline cookie usage and basic compliance information.
Provide contact details or a link to the contact page for legal or privacy-related inquiries.

incoming_params.description: Which legal section to display, e.g., 'terms', 'privacy', or 'cookies'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Contact us about privacy or legal questions' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Legal' link in the footer.
Different legal sections can be deep-linked via the 'section' query parameter.

header_links.description: Browse extension packages, including rear extensions with size and budget filters.
Browse kitchen renovation packages and book consultations.
Browse bathroom renovation packages and related services.
View completed renovation and extension projects gallery.
Generate renovation cost estimates and email summaries.
Create a multi-project renovation plan and request a combined quote.
Read articles on permits, planning, and renovation tips.
Find answers to common questions, including bathroom renovation warranties.
Access articles you have saved to read later.
View and manage saved renovation and extension packages.
View and manage saved project ideas from the gallery.
Send general inquiries or follow-up questions.

footer_links.description: Learn more about the builder and their experience.
Browse the gallery of completed projects.
View renovation advice and planning articles.
Read frequently asked questions and answers.
Get in touch via the contact form.
Read the website’s terms and privacy policy.
